# Node Roadmap For Carni-mvp

## Basics Already Covered

- Node runtime
- npm scripts
- CommonJS with `require()`
- `axios` HTTP requests
- `.env` with `dotenv`

## Next Layer

- Express or Nest-style HTTP server
- structured routes and controllers
- environment validation
- service separation

## Backend Essentials

- Supabase or PostgreSQL integration
- auth with JWT or OAuth
- secure API key handling
- testing with Jest

## Operations

- Dockerized local execution
- CI/CD via GitHub Actions
- deployment and observability
- performance and scalability only when justified
